haiku:
Waves dance with the sun,
Bright shells twinkle on the shore,
Blue depths sing with joy.
Happy #WorldOceansDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sunshine warms the heart,
Side by side, dreams take their flight,
Friendship's sweet embrace.
Happy #NationalBestFriendsDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Designs like sunlight,
Nature dances through the glass,
Harmony in blooms.
#HappyBirthdayFrankLloydWright from @ClamBakeSanta

Silver light whispers,
Soft shadows dance in the night,
Stars twinkle with joy.
Happy #LastQuarterMoon from @ClamBakeSanta

Fresh pie on the sill,
Sweet-tart scents in the warm air,
Crust and joy unite.
Happy #NationalStrawberryRhubarbPieDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Feathers bright and bold,
Splashing in a sunny pond,
Waddles full of glee.
Happy #DonaldDuckDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright notes fill the room,
Melodies dance like warm light,
Cake and cheer abound.
#HappyBirthdayColePorter from @ClamBakeSanta

Frosty glass in hand,
Lemon slices swirl like sun,
Sipping summer's ease.
Happy #NationalIcedTeaDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Ink flows like river,
Words dance on the soft paper,
Dreams take flight today.
Happy #BallpointPenDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Velvet skies above,
Sweet melodies dance with light,
Heartfelt cheers abound.
#HappyBirthdayJudyGarland from @ClamBakeSanta

Wild things dance and play,
Imagination takes flight,
Dreams stir in the night.
#HappyBirthdayMauriceSendak from @ClamBakeSanta

theme: National Corn on the Cob Day
haiku:
Golden kernels glow,
Butter drips, sweet corn's embrace,
Summer's taste unfolds.
Happy #NationalCornOnTheCobDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden kernels shine,
Buttery bliss coats each bite,
Sweet summer delight.
Happy #CornOnTheCobDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright candles aglow,
Joyful hearts sing sweet praises,
Cake shared with delight.
#HappyBirthdayMillicentFawcett from @ClamBakeSanta

Warm dough hugs my hands,
Peanut butter scents the air,
A cookie so sweet.
Happy #NationalPeanutButterCookieDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Crimson blooms unfold,
Perfumed breezes gently sway,
Joy in bright bouquets.
Happy #RedRoseDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Candles softly glow,
Laughter fills the bright room air,
Hope blooms everywhere.
#HappyBirthdayAnneFrank from @ClamBakeSanta

Green leaves touch the sky,
Soft earth yields to eager hands,
Life blooms with each weed.
Happy #NationalWeedYourGardenDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright threads intertwine,
Whir of joy fills the cool air,
Patterns join as one.
Happy #SewingMachineDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden leaves cascade,
Whispers of a poet's dream,
Laughter breezes in.
#HappyBirthdayWilliamButlerYeats from @ClamBakeSanta

Banners in the breeze,
Joyful hearts and laughter ring,
Unity shines bright.
Happy #FlagDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Juicy berries shine,
Fluffy clouds of whipped cream swirl,
Sweet joy on each slice.
Happy #NationalStrawberryShortcakeDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Crisp leaves twirl in air,
Stories weave through warm sunlight,
Voices rise with cheer.
#HappyBirthdayHarrietBeecherStowe from @ClamBakeSanta
